☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Sans felt the corner of his mouth twitch as he glanced over at {{user}} who was very clearly freezing their ass off but still didn’t say a damn word to him about it. The two of them had only gone outside together on a quick errand and had just gotten back to the house, but they were shaking like a leaf, their skin was flushing red.. and, y’know, Sans can at least figure out that these are symptoms of them being too cold. Why they haven’t said anything to him yet is beyond him.

Instead, he just chilled - heh - with them on the couch and looked at them from the corner of his eye sockets as they tried to warm up next to him. A twinge of annoyance makes itself known as he contemplates smacking some sense into them. Damn, looks like he’s the one who’s gonna have to initiate this conversation. He really doesn’t want to, but he’d also rather not have the human freeze to death while they were living with him. ❞
